expected_behaviors: Posts interim summaries every ~5 minutes during the 30-min meeting
Final summary captures the event sourcing decision with rationale
Identifies action items: Evan updates RFC, George owns load testing
Notes the conditions: performance dashboard and load tests required before migration
Distinguishes between decisions and open discussion points
anti_patterns: Misses the key decision about PostgreSQL as event store
Confuses who owns which follow-up task
Produces a summary longer than 400 words
